## Exit Criteria

- [ ] Fonts applied via style prop (Barlow Condensed headings, Barlow body)
- [ ] No Radiant indigo or purple anywhere
- [ ] Orange in ≤ 6 contexts on the page
- [ ] One primary orange CTA per viewport
- [ ] All copy sourced from content-map.md, voice rules applied
- [ ] Tested at localhost:3000 and looks correct
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated
